nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=92 beats='second person; you are {HERO} of {VESSEL} easing out of the last dark slip on the near shore of {STRAIT}; the crossing is one hard route through a line of checkpoints the far side keeps lit and listening; grave stakes, stated plainly: many have gone and few have returned'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=80 beats='the near lights fall away; the strait opens black and wide; the one rule of the run is stated here: there is no turning back and no second boat, only the next mark and the next, all the way across or not at all'>>

choices.label: Line up on the first mark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=76 beats='the first mark is {ST01_OBSTACLE}: a chain-and-net barrier across the mouth, its floats riding low, an ebb gap worked into the seaward corner by the tide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST01_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the screw takes the chain and stops the boat dead on the barrier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the runner hangs dead on the boom in the open while the shore guns find the range; the strait keeps it, quick and without dwelling'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the net takes the bow and will not give it back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the tide swings you broadside against the boom and holds you there; the run ends in the first hour of the crossing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: waiting spends the dark you needed'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the patrol closes on a boat that sat too long; the water is cold and the end is fast'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the hull meets steel that was made not to yield'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the floats are strung on steel that does not break; the bow stoves and the sea comes in where you struck'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the near end is the watched end'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the shoreward end sits under the guardhouse lamps; you are lit the moment you close it, and the wall has all the time it needs'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='scrape the gap late and take a corner float along the hull; loud, but through'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the loud engine writes your position on the dark'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the noise brings the light and then the gun; you do not clear the shore'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='hands up in the dark; the guard boat comes alongside and the run is over before it began, but you are alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST01_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Rev clear and run loud past the guardhouse.
Cut power and drift to the guard boat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST01_OBSTACLE}; it is slipped only through the ebb gap on the seaward corner; the chain fouls a screw and the net holds a bow, and either one pins you under the shore guns; ride the gap, never the barrier; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Slip the ebb gap on the seaward corner.
Cut straight over the chain floats.
Gun the engine and force the net.
Wait at the boom for the gap to widen.
Ram the floats to break a wider gap.
Try the shoreward end, nearer the wall.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='{ST02_OBSTACLE} mark the swept water; some ride true and some are false, wired to the mines below and set to look exactly like the rest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST02_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the shortcut runs straight over the charges'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='inside the line the bottom is mined; the strait takes the runner and its pilot without ceremony'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the doubled mark was the warning you did not read'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the buoy was a lure set over a charge; the water closes over the run'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: wide water here is mined water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='wide of the swept lane is the field itself; the end comes from below, sudden and final'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: there is no reading a mark at speed'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='speed leaves no time to read a doubled mark from a single one; you read one wrong at the worst moment'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: a light tells you nothing true here'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the false buoys carry lights too; a light is not a topmark, and the one you trusted sat over the mine'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='misread one mark and feel the hull kiss a mooring wire; it holds, and you back onto the single line'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the mark you chose sits over the charge'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='trusting the doubled mark is trusting the mine; there is no reading it twice'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='the launch was waiting for exactly this; they board in silence and the crossing ends, but not your life'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST02_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Trust the wrong buoy and hold on.
Signal the launch shadowing the line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST02_OBSTACLE}; the true buoys carry a single steady topmark and the false ones a doubled mark; steer buoy to buoy on the single mark and the mined water on either side will not touch you; read every mark before you turn; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Steer the single-topmark line, buoy to buoy.
Cut inside the line to save the distance.
Follow the nearest buoy, mark unread.
Swing wide around the whole buoy line.
Hold speed and thread it fast.
Steer by the buoys' lights alone.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='the guard cutter works {ST03_OBSTACLE} across the middle water, up the line and back, turning at each end with her stern to the strait'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST03_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the bow watch has the whole strait to look across'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the searchlight and the horn come together; the run ends in the middle of the strait'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: there is nowhere to be beside her that is not seen'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you cannot hide in a straight line beside a warship; she turns and you are simply there'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: stillness on flat water is its own signal'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a stopped hull on flat water is a shape against the light; close by is close enough'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the stern is watched as well as the bow'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='close under the stern is close under the after watch; they look straight down onto you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: she never leaves; only your night does'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='she does not leave the lane; the dark you spent waiting is gone and the dawn is not far'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='mistime the turn and take her wash broadside; you wallow unseen by a hand's width and claw into the dark'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the open water is all hers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a runner does not outrun a cutter across open water; her guns reach where your engine cannot'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='the cutter comes down slow and certain; you are taken off the strait alive, the run finished'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST03_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Open up and outrun her down the lane.
Show a light and heave to.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST03_OBSTACLE}; cross astern of her on the turn, in the blind quarter of her stern wake; cross ahead of her bow and her lookouts have the whole open strait to see you against; time the turn and take the blind water; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Cross astern on her turn, in the wake.
Dash across ahead of her bow.
Match her speed and shadow her up the lane.
Stop dead and let her pass close by.
Duck across right under her stern gun.
Wait for her to leave the lane entirely.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=76 beats='you come under {ST04_OBSTACLE}: a shore searchlight beam going over the water and back, holding the far side, swinging across on a slow ten-count, holding, swinging back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST04_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the beam lays across a boat that did not stop'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the guns answer the moving wake; the reach keeps the runner'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the turn makes light of its own'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the turn throws a bright curl exactly where the beam is looking; the end is fast and grave'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: light crosses the reach faster than any hull'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you cannot outrun a beam of light; it lays over you mid-reach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the lamp sees best closest in'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='there is no blind spot at the foot of a searchlight; you drive straight into its keepers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: your own light gives you up'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a light answered from the water is a boat confessed; they hold the beam on you and fire'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='freeze a beat too late and feel the beam brush your stern; it moves on unsure and you go still until it is gone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the wake is all they need'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='daring a gun line is not a plan; they track the wake and close the reach'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you give yourself to the beam and the boat behind it; the reach takes the run but leaves you breathing'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST04_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Gun it and dare the gunners.
Cut power and stand into the light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST04_OBSTACLE}; move only while the beam is away and the water is dark; when the bar comes over, freeze and be a still shape among still shapes; motion under the light is what the gunners fire on; run the dark, hold the light; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Run on the dark, freeze under the beam.
Keep steady speed through the sweep.
Turn hard away when the light appears.
Race to beat the beam across.
Hide in the glare by steering at the source.
Signal-flash back to confuse the crew.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the water goes quiet in a way that listens; {ST05_OBSTACLE} on the point hears engines across the whole narrows'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST05_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the note carries the whole width of the water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you are found by sound before you are ever seen; the narrows keep the runner'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the quiet keeps nothing back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='one note is enough; the bearing goes out and the end comes up the strait to meet you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: speed is only a louder note'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='sprinting past a listening post is announcing yourself; the picket is already on the bearing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: reverse thunders where ahead only murmured'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a reversed screw is the loudest note of all; the post has you before you have steerage'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='a gust swings you and you feed her a breath of throttle; the post stirs, uncertain, and you crawl on'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the sound arrives before you do'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you cannot outrun a bearing already sent; the picket is on the line ahead of you'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you go quiet for good and let the picket find you; they take you off the narrows alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST05_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Open up and run for it.
Cut the engine dead and wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST05_OBSTACLE}; drop to a crawl and let the tide do the work; a hard engine note carries straight to the post and lays the picket on your bearing; run silent or run seen; keep the note low; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Throttle down to a crawl and drift the tide.
Hold cruising revs to clear it quickly.
Blip the throttle to hold your heading.
Reverse to hold against the tide.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='{ST06_OBSTACLE} lie ahead: moored charges just under the surface, their float wires catching starlight in thin lines, a single swept drift of clear water down the middle'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST06_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the first wire finds the hull'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the wider gap is wide because it is mined; the narrows end the run in a single grave instant'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: haste hauls the mine home'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='speed turns a brushed wire into a struck charge; the end is sudden'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: each turn adds a wire to cross'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='weaving only multiplies the wires you cross; one is enough'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: there is no gentle way to move a charge'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the float is the mine; to touch it is to fire it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: another's luck is not a chart'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the wake you followed was luck, not a lane; where it went safe you go a foot wrong and that foot is the field'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='a wire slides along the hull and does not catch; you hold your breath and your line to the last float'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the field is wired everywhere but the drift'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a minefield does not answer to nerve; the new lane is wired like the rest'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='the shore sends a pilot that is also a guard; you are led out of the field and off the run, alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST06_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Force a new lane on nerve.
Stop and hail the shore for a pilot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST06_OBSTACLE}; hold the clear drift dead center where no wires show; a wire touched at speed pulls the charge to the hull; stay off the wires and off the throttle; center and slow is the only water that forgives; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Hold dead center down the clear drift.
Take the wider gap to starboard.
Speed up to spend less time in it.
Nudge a float aside to open the lane.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='{ST07_OBSTACLE} lies across the strait: a drowned hull grounded years back, its plating just below the surface at this state of tide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST07_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: calm is only the plating holding still'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='calm water over a wreck is shallow water; the strait comes in where the plating opened the hull'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the near end is the high end'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the bow of the wreck sits highest; you ground hard in the open and the shore lights find you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: iron does not let a keel bounce'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you do not skip a wreck; you tear the bottom out on it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the current lays you on the iron'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the current sets you sideways onto the very plating you meant to clear; slow does not mean safe here'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the keel grazes plating in the scour and grinds free; you feel the strait not quite take you and steer on'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: speed only sharpens the iron'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='commitment against a wreck only holes you faster; the run ends grounded and torn'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you set her on the wreck on purpose and wait; the guard skiff takes you off, the crossing lost, your life kept'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST07_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Ram at full speed and commit.
Ground her gently and wave in the skiff.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST07_OBSTACLE}; the only water over the wreck is the scour channel off its stern where the tide has dug deep; everywhere else the plating waits a foot down to open your hull; take the stern scour or nothing; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Run the deep scour off the wreck's stern.
Cross amidships where it looks calm.
Try the bow end, nearer and quicker.
Ram across to skip the plating.
Drift over slow on the current alone.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='{ST08_OBSTACLE} ranges the outer water; the far battery's shots walk in slow rows across the swell, each row a little nearer the last, with a fired-over lull between'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST08_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: you arrive where the shells are already sent'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='ahead of the ranging rows is where the next salvo falls; the gun line closes on you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the rows come back around to your stillness'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the guns do not stop for a waiting boat; the rows walk back over you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the zigzag only lengthens your stay in the fall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a battery ranges an area, not a point; the zigzag keeps you in the beaten zone longer'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: speed carries you into the next fall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='full power carries you across two rows into the third; you outrun the lull, not the shells'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the turn gives them your length'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='there is no back on this run; the turn offers your broadside and the end finds you turning'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='a row falls close enough to throw water over the deck; the boat staggers, holds, and you drive on through the spray'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the fall does not care how steady your hand'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='nerve does not turn a shell; the next row does not miss twice'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='the white light stills the battery; a boat comes out and the run is over, but you live'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST08_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Push through the fall on nerve.
Show a white light and stop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST08_OBSTACLE}; run in the lull just behind the last row, on water already fired over and not yet fired on again; get ahead of the rows and you put yourself where the next salvo is already aimed; stay behind the fall; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Run the lull just behind the last row.
Push ahead of the rows to clear it.
Hold position and wait it out.
Charge straight through at full power.
Turn back seaward out of range.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='{ST09_OBSTACLE} lies across the far half of the strait, thick enough to blind the shore and thick enough to blind you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST09_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: feel bends your track back the way you came'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you circle back under the battery you cleared and the guns finish the crossing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the fog hides the hull you strike'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='blind speed finds the one hard thing in all that softness; the run ends against what you never saw'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the horn is a bearing given away'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the echo that answers is a guard boat's; the horn fixed your bearing for the picket as surely as for you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the tide steers what you will not'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the tide inside the fog carries you where you cannot tell; you drift onto the shore batteries broadside'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the fog thins for a heartbeat and shows you off course; you correct to the compass and the grey folds back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the feeling was wrong the whole time'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the gut in fog is a liar; it walks you back into the beaten water'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='the picket under the fog finds the still boat; they take you quietly, the run undone'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST09_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Trust your gut over the needle.
Lie still and wait to be found.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST09_OBSTACLE}; the fog hides you only on a held compass course and a slow steady note; chase your own sense of direction inside it and you circle back onto the guns you just passed; trust the needle, not the feeling; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Hold the compass course, slow and steady.
Steer by feel toward the shore.
Sound the horn to fix a bearing.
Stop and drift until it lifts.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='{ST10_OBSTACLE} of small guard boats rides the inshore swell, spaced wide, each showing a shaded lamp to hold station on the next, a dark gap of unwatched water between them'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST10_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the lamp's own crew sees best right beneath it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='they have you at once and the picket line closes; the run ends inshore'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the noise gathers all the lamps'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a charge draws every shaded lamp at once; the boats converge on the noise'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the screen turns and looks back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a picket that feels a shadow at its stern turns; there is no hiding behind the boat whose task is to watch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the line keeps its lights all night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the lamps do not go out; they are relieved, never dark, and your night runs out first'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: overlap is the brightest water of all'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='where two lamps overlap the water is doubly lit, not blind; both crews have you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='a lamp swings your way and you go flat and dark; it passes over you and holds on its neighbor and you slide through'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: fresh boats run down a tired one'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the pickets are fresh and inshore and many; a spent runner does not outrun them home'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you go dark and still and let them come; the picket boats close around you in their lamps, alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST10_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Ram the gap and outrun them.
Douse everything and let them close.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST10_OBSTACLE}; thread the dark gap between two shaded lamps where each picket is night-blind toward the other; pass close under one lamp and its own crew has you in the light; take the gap, not the boat; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Thread the dark gap between two lamps.
Slip close past the nearest picket.
Charge where the gap looks widest.
Follow a picket in as a screen.
Wait for a lamp to be doused.
Cross where two lamps overlap, thinking it blind.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='{ST11_OBSTACLE} guards the inner water: a log-and-net line with a warden's skiff patrolling its length on a lantern'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST11_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the lantern lights you for the warden'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the lantern shows the warden your hull and the warden shows the shore; the inner water keeps the run'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the logs turn and hold the keel'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the logs roll and foul and stop you astride the boom; the skiff comes back to a boat gone still'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the round comes back before the cut is done'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the net is longer than your nerve and the skiff's round; the lantern returns before the last strand parts'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the skiff keeps its round past your night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the skiff does not moor before dawn; the reeds hold you until the light does the warden's work'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the skiff's lantern lifts your way and you drop behind a boom float; it swings past and you slip the end'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the shout outruns the boat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the warden's shout carries to the inner posts faster than your hull; they are ready inshore'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you let the skiff come alongside; the warden takes your line and the run, but not your life'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST11_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Run past the warden loud and fast.
Lay off and let the warden come.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST11_OBSTACLE}; the warden's skiff works it end to end on a fixed lantern-lit round; slip the boom at the far end just after the skiff turns away, in the dark it leaves behind; meet the lantern and the whole inner shore wakes; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Slip the boom behind the skiff's turn.
Cross right under the skiff's lantern.
Force the log line at speed.
Cut the net with a knife over the side.
Wait in the reeds for the skiff to moor.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='{ST12_OBSTACLE} lies across the last mile: the swell rearing and breaking over it in the dark, a line of pale collapsing water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST12_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the set arrives while you are broadside'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a breaking sea on the bow stands her up and throws her over; the bar rolls the run under a mile from shore'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the short line is the shallow line'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the shallow break is the hardest water on the bar; she broaches and fills'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the break comes apart around the hull, and the hull with it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the bar does not let a boat slam through; it takes the hull apart on the way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the beam meets the crest and loses'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='quartering a breaking bar gives the sea your beam at the top of the slot; she goes over sideways'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='a set catches you half-slotted and the stern lifts hard; you drive off the crest and down the back, shipping water but through'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the water gives the screw nothing to hold'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the whitewater has no bottom to push against; the screw races and the sea takes charge'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you hold off the break and show a light; a shore boat crosses the bar you could not and takes you in, alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST12_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Stand off and signal for a shore boat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST12_OBSTACLE}; cross on the back of a swell through the deep slot where the break is lowest, timed to the sets; take it on the face of a breaking sea and it stands the boat on end and rolls her; read the sets, take the slot; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Cross on a swell's back through the deep slot.
Drive in without waiting on the sets.
Take the shortest line over the shallows.
Gun over the break and slam through.
Quarter the swell at an angle.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='{ST13_OBSTACLE} waits: a low belt of staked wire and obstacles the length of it, with one cleared lane the far side keeps for its own boats, held on a leading mark against the dunes'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='past {ST13_OBSTACLE} the strait lets you on; the far shore is a little nearer and the run a little longer survived'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: nearest is not clearest'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the wire holds the boat fast in the wash and the sentries have you against the pale surf; the run ends on the beach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the obstacles were made for the hard-driven boat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='one held breath in which the whole run narrows to this; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the belt is built to stop exactly this; the boat hangs holed on the stakes'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the unexpected place is the well-wired place'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='there is a moment where it could still be undone, and then that moment is gone; grave, quiet, no cruelty drawn out'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the flank is wired thickest where boats are least expected; she grounds fast in it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: a guess is a stake's width wrong'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='the strait is very old and very patient and it has all the time this takes; the fear is clean and brief'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a guessed mark lands you a stake's width into the belt; a width is enough on this beach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='you drift a stake's width off the mark and feel wire drag the hull; it tears free and you steer back onto the lead'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the mistake lands: the belt takes the driven boat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=56 beats='you have a heartbeat to know it and no way left to stop it; the register stays grave and spare'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you cannot drive over a staked belt; the wire holds the boat in the surf until the guns arrive'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=66 beats='you rise in the surf with empty hands; the beach party wades out and the run ends in the shallows, alive'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='you are spotted but still moving off {ST13_OBSTACLE}; one breath to choose; state the three ways this goes and that only the hard quiet one keeps the run alive'>>

choices.label: Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Gun the beach and drive over the wire.
Stop in the wash and stand with hands raised.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='you are on {ST13_OBSTACLE}; come in on the leading mark down the cleared lane where the wire is cut; run the beach anywhere else and the obstacles hold the boat fast in the surf under the sentries' guns; find the mark, keep the lane; state the rule plainly before the choice so the reader can see which way is death'>>

choices.label: Come in on the leading mark, down the cut lane.
Beach her wherever the shore is nearest.
Hit the beach hard to punch the belt.
Land off on the flank away from the lane.
Come straight in fast on a guess at the mark.
Gamble it and take the risk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the boat noses onto shingle in the dark; the crossing is behind you but the beach is not yet safe; a shape waits up the spit where the contact should be'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='you kill the engine; the silence after all that noise is enormous; the shape resolves into a figure, then two, and one of them stands wrong'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=92 beats='the last rule of the run, stated here: the contact answers a fixed countersign and never moves toward you first; a figure that closes without the word is a sentry; give the word and hold, or you walk the whole strait's work into a gun on dry land'>>

choices.label: Give the countersign and hold your ground.
Break inland past the figure without waiting.
Draw first on the figure that moves.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=64 beats='you run past the word into the dark and the dark is wired and watched; the beach party takes you a hundred yards from the crossing you survived'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='you draw first and are wrong; the figure was your own contact and the shot brings the sentries; the run ends on the beach it should have won'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the countersign comes back in a low steady voice; the figure stops, then lifts a hand; the contact is real and the run is nearly done'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=88 beats='the contact offers two ways off the beach and one truth: you made a crossing few make; state the choice between a clean quiet handoff, a harder faster one under the guns, and the plain spent honest arrival, each a real end to the run'>>

choices.label: Take the clean quiet handoff and vanish inland.
Take the hard fast route out under the guns.
Simply hand off the cargo and stand down, spent.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=86 beats='the handoff is clean and silent; {CARGO} goes inland into safe hands and you with it, the whole lethal strait behind you and every mark of it survived; a clean run, the rarest kind, told plainly and without triumph'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=84 beats='the fast route out draws fire and you take it and keep going; you reach the safe line battered and half-swamped but whole, the run made at a price; a costly crossing earned the hard way to the last yard'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=82 beats='you give up {CARGO} and sit on the cold shingle with nothing left; the run is done and so are you, and both of those are enough; a quiet arrival, no triumph in it, only the strait crossed and the work delivered'>>
